sql.if: and (a.breach_days > 0 and a.breach_days <= 15 and a.dealed_amount < a.total_amount)
and (a.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and a.settlement_type is not null)
and ( a.contract_no like CONCAT('%',#{contractNo},'%') or buyc.contract_no like CONCAT('%',#{contractNo},'%') )

if.if: and (a.company_name like CONCAT('%',#{companyName},'%') or sell.company_name like CONCAT('%',#{companyName},'%') or dc.company_name like CONCAT('%',#{companyName},'%') )

sql.if: and ( a.match_user_name like CONCAT('%',#{matchUserName},'%') or buyc.match_user_name like CONCAT('%',#{matchUserName},'%') )
and ( a.products_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsName},'%') or buyc.products_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsName},'%') )
and (a.breach_days > 0 and a.breach_days <= 15 and a.dealed_amount < a.total_amount)
and (a.dealed_amount >= a.total_amount and a.bill_flg = false and a.receive_breach_amount < a.breach_amount)
and (a.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and a.business_type_dcsx in ('BL','PT') and a.match_credit_flg = true)
and (a.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and a.business_type_dcsx in ('DCSXBL','DCSX','DCSXHDFK') and dc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and a.match_credit_flg = true)
and ( a.contract_no like CONCAT('%',#{contractNo},'%') or sell_c.contract_no like CONCAT('%',#{contractNo},'%') )
and (a.company_name like CONCAT('%',#{companyName},'%') or sell_c.company_name like CONCAT('%',#{companyName},'%') or dc.company_name like CONCAT('%',#{companyName},'%') )
and ( a.match_user_name like CONCAT('%',#{matchUserName},'%') or sell_c.match_user_name like CONCAT('%',#{matchUserName},'%') )
and (a.breach_days > 0 and a.breach_days <= 15 and a.dealed_amount < a.total_amount)
and ( (a.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and a.settlement_type is not null) or (sell_c.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and sell_c.settlement_type is not null) )
and ( (a.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and a.settlement_type is null) or (sell_c.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and sell_c.settlement_type is null) )
and (a.delivery_out_number < a.total_number or a.delivery_out_number is null )
and (a.invoice_bill_amount < a.sell_total_amount or a.invoice_bill_amount is null)

and (a.sell_contract_status = 'D' or ( (a.receive_amount >= a.sell_total_amount) and (a.invoice_bill_amount >= a.sell_total_amount) and (a.delivery_in_number >= a.total_number) and (a.confirm_receive_number>=total_number) ) )

and ( a.receive_amount < a.sell_total_amount or a.receive_amount is null or a.invoice_bill_amount < a.sell_total_amount or a.delivery_in_number < a.total_number or a.confirm_receive_number < total_number )
and (a.breach_days > 0 and a.breach_days <= 15 and a.receive_breach_amount < a.breach_amount)
and (a.breach_days <= 0 or a.breach_amount = 0 or a.receive_breach_amount >= a.breach_amount)
and (a.breach_days <= 15 and a.breach_days > 0 and a.breach_amount > 0 and a.receive_breach_amount >= a.breach_amount)
and (a.receive_amount >= a.sell_total_amount and a.bill_flg = false and a.receive_breach_amount < a.breach_amount)
and (a.receipt_bill_amount < a.buy_total_amount or a.receipt_bill_amount is null)
and (a.buy_contract_status = 'D' or ( (a.pay_amount >= a.buy_total_amount) and (a.receipt_bill_amount >= a.buy_total_amount) and (a.delivery_in_number >= a.total_number) ))
and ( a.pay_amount < a.buy_total_amount or (a.receipt_bill_amount < a.buy_total_amount) or (a.delivery_in_number < a.total_number) or a.buy_contract_status is null )

mapper.select:
select c.approve_no approveNo, a.products_name productName, a.contract_time, a.total_number,
a.id id,
a.match_user_id, a.match_user_name,
buyc.company_name buyCompanyName, buy.contract_no buyContractNo, buyc.deal_price bdealPrice, buyc.total_amount btotalAmount, buyc.dealed_amount bdealedAmount, buyc.billed_amount bbilledAmount, buyc.total_amount - buyc.dealed_amount balancePayable, buy.pay_rate bPayRate, buy.pay_rate_amount bPayRateAmount,
a.contract_no sellContractNo, a.company_name sellCompanyName, a.deal_price sdealPrice, a.total_amount stotalAmount, a.dealed_amount sdealedAmount, a.billed_amount sbilledAmount, a.total_amount - a.dealed_amount balanceReceivable, sell.pay_rate sPayRate, sell.pay_rate_amount sPayRateAmount, sellt.real_bill_date sBillTime, a.appoint_pay_full_time sPayFullTime, buyt.real_bill_date bBillTime, buy.pay_full_time bPayFullTime, sellt.real_warehose_date slastDeliveryDate, buyt.real_warehose_date blastDeliveryDate, buyc.warehouse_number bWarehouseNumber, a.warehouse_number sWarehouseNumber, a.confirm_date confirmDate,
a.confirm_date confirmDate, b.gross_profit marginAmount, b.company_commission companyCommissionAmount, round(b.company_commission / buy.total_amount,4) companyCommissionRate,
case when a.contract_status = 'C' then 'C' when a.contract_status = 'D' then 'D' when a.dealed_amount >= a.total_amount and a.billed_amount < a.total_amount and a.receive_breach_amount < a.breach_amount then 'YJ' when a.breach_days > 0 and a.breach_days <= 15 and a.dealed_amount < a.total_amount then 'Y' when a.breach_days > 15 and a.dealed_amount < a.total_amount then 'W' when a.billed_amount >= a.total_amount and a.dealed_amount >= a.total_amount then 'D' when a.billed_amount >= a.total_amount then 'V' when a.confirm_receive_number >= a.total_number then 'M' when a.warehouse_number >= a.total_number then 'G' when a.dealed_amount >= a.total_amount then 'F' when a.seal_flg = true then 'S' when a.status = 'D' then 'B' else 'N' end as contractStatus
from t_ctr_contract a left join t_apply_match b on b.approve_id = a.approve_id left join t_pm_approve c on c.id = a.approve_id left join t_apply_match_detail buy on buy.apply_match_id = b.id left join t_apply_match_detail sell on sell.apply_match_id = b.id left join t_ctr_contract buyc on buyc.id = buy.contract_id left join t_ctr_contract_apply buyt on buyc.id = buyt.ctr_contract_id left join t_ctr_contract_apply sellt on a.id = sellt.ctr_contract_id where a.status = 'D' and a.contract_type = 'S' and buy.contract_type = 'B' and sell.contract_type = 'S'
and c.id in
#{item}
order by a.contract_time desc

select a.id id, a.approve_no approveNo, a.product_name productName, a.contract_time, a.total_number, a.match_user_id, a.match_user_name, a.buy_company_name buyCompanyName, a.buy_contract_no buyContractNo, a.buy_price bdealPrice, a.buy_total_amount btotalAmount, a.pay_amount bdealedAmount, a.receipt_bill_amount bbilledAmount, a.receipt_bill_date bBillTime, a.balance_payable balancePayable, a.buy_bond_rate bPayRate, a.buy_bond_amount bPayRateAmount, a.sell_contract_no sellContractNo, a.sell_company_name sellCompanyName, a.sell_price sdealPrice, a.sell_total_amount stotalAmount, a.receive_amount sdealedAmount, a.invoice_bill_amount sbilledAmount, a.invoice_bill_date sBillTime, a.balance_receivable balanceReceivable, a.sell_bond_rate sPayRate, a.sell_bond_amount sPayRateAmount, a.appoint_pay_full_time sPayFullTime, a.pay_full_date bPayFullTime, a.delivery_out_date slastDeliveryDate, a.delivery_in_date blastDeliveryDate, a.delivery_in_number bWarehouseNumber, a.delivery_out_number sWarehouseNumber, a.confirm_date confirmDate from t_ctr_contract_profit a
order by a.contract_time desc

select round(sum(a.total_number), 2) totalTotalNumber, round(sum(a.buy_total_amount), 2) totalBtotalAmount, round(sum(a.sell_total_amount), 2) totalStotalAmount, round(sum(a.receive_amount), 2) totalSdealedAmount, round(sum(a.pay_amount), 2) totalBdealedAmount, round(sum(a.invoice_bill_amount), 2) totalSbilledAmount, round(sum(a.receipt_bill_amount), 2) totalBbilledAmount, round(sum(a.buy_total_amount - a.pay_amount), 2) totalBalancePayable, round(sum(a.sell_total_amount - a.receive_amount), 2) totalBalanceReceivable from t_ctr_contract_profit a

select c.approve_no, a.products_name productName, a.contract_time, a.total_number,
a.match_user_name, a.match_user_id,
buy.contract_no buyContractNo, buy.company_name buyCompanyName, buy.deal_price bdealPrice, buy.total_amount btotalAmount, d.buy_commission_amount buyCommission,
a.contract_no sellContractNo, a.company_name sellCompanyName, sell.deal_price sdealPrice, sell.total_amount stotalAmount, d.sell_commission_amount sellCommission,
a.credit_cycle creditDays, a.settlement_type, sell.premium*a.total_number premiumAmount, a.service_amount serviceAmount, d.vat_amount as valueAddedTax, d.surtax as saleSurtax, d.print_amount as stampTax, d.capital_cost as capitalCost, d.insurance_cost as insuranceCost, d.margin_amount marginAmount, d.company_commission_amount, round(d.company_commission_amount/buy.total_amount,4) companyCommissionRate, d.marketing_retention marketingRetention, d.company_commission_amount companyCommission, d.net_profit netProfit,
case when a.contract_status = 'C' then 'C' when a.contract_status = 'D' then 'D' when a.dealed_amount >= a.total_amount and a.billed_amount < a.total_amount and a.receive_breach_amount < a.breach_amount then 'YJ' when a.breach_days > 0 and a.breach_days <= 15 and a.dealed_amount < a.total_amount then 'Y' when a.breach_days > 15 and a.dealed_amount < a.total_amount then 'W' when a.billed_amount >= a.total_amount and a.dealed_amount >= a.total_amount then 'D' when a.billed_amount >= a.total_amount then 'V' when a.confirm_receive_number >= a.total_number then 'M' when a.warehouse_number >= a.total_number then 'G' when a.dealed_amount >= a.total_amount then 'F' when a.seal_flg = true then 'S' when a.status = 'D' then 'B' else 'N' end as contractStatus
from t_ctr_contract a left join t_pm_approve c on c.id = a.approve_id left join t_apply_match b on b.approve_id = a.approve_id left join t_apply_match_detail buy on buy.apply_match_id = b.id left join t_ctr_contract buyc on buyc.id = buy.contract_id left join t_apply_match_detail sell on sell.apply_match_id = b.id left join t_budget_settlement d on d.sell_contract_id = a.id where a.status = 'D' and a.contract_type = 'S' and buy.contract_type = 'B' and sell.contract_type = 'S' and d.id is not null
and c.id in
#{item}

select sum(a.total_number) totalTotalNumber, sum(buy.deal_price) / count(a.id) aveBdealPrice, sum(sell.deal_price) / count(a.id) aveSdealPrice, sum(buy.total_amount) totalBtotalAmount, sum(sell.total_amount) totalStotalAmount, sum(a.credit_cycle)/count(a.id) aveCreditDays, sum(sell.premium * a.total_number) totalPremiumAmount, sum(a.service_amount) totalServiceAmount,
sum(d.vat_amount) as totalValueAddedTax, sum(d.surtax) as totalSaleSurtax, sum(d.print_amount) as totalStampTax,
sum(d.margin_amount) totalMarginAmount, sum(d.company_commission_amount) totalCompanyCommissionAmount, round(sum(d.company_commission_amount) / sum(buy.total_amount), 4) aveCompanyCommissionRate, sum(d.marketing_retention) totalMarketingRetention, sum(d.buy_commission_amount) totalBuyCommission, sum(d.sell_commission_amount) totalSellCommission, sum(d.company_commission_amount) totalCompanyCommission, sum(d.net_profit) totalNetProfit, sum(d.capital_cost) as totalCapitalCost, sum(d.insurance_cost) as totalInsuranceCost
from t_ctr_contract a left join t_pm_approve c on c.id = a.approve_id left join t_apply_match b on b.approve_id = a.approve_id left join t_apply_match_detail buy on buy.apply_match_id = b.id left join t_ctr_contract buyc on buyc.id = buy.contract_id left join t_apply_match_detail sell on sell.apply_match_id = b.id left join t_budget_settlement d on d.sell_contract_id = a.id where a.status = 'D' and a.contract_type = 'S' and buy.contract_type = 'B' and sell.contract_type = 'S' and d.id is not null
and c.id in
#{item}

select c.approve_no approveNo, a.products_name productName, a.contract_time, a.total_number, c.id, a.match_user_id, a.match_user_name, buy.pay_rate bPayRate, buy.pay_rate_amount bPayRateAmount, dc.company_name buyCompanyName, dc.contract_no buyContractNo, dc.deal_price bdealPrice, dc.total_amount btotalAmount, dc.dealed_amount bdealedAmount, dc.billed_amount bbilledAmount, dc.total_amount - dc.dealed_amount balancePayable, dc.pay_full_time bPayFullTime, buyt.real_warehose_date blastDeliveryDate, buyc.warehouse_number bWarehouseNumber,
a.contract_no sellContractNo, a.company_name sellCompanyName, a.deal_price sdealPrice, a.total_amount stotalAmount, a.dealed_amount sdealedAmount, a.billed_amount sbilledAmount, a.total_amount - a.dealed_amount balanceReceivable, sell.pay_rate sPayRate, sell.pay_rate_amount sPayRateAmount, sellt.real_bill_date sBillTime, a.appoint_pay_full_time sPayFullTime, sellt.real_warehose_date slastDeliveryDate, a.warehouse_number sWarehouseNumber, a.confirm_date confirmDate,
b.gross_profit marginAmount, b.company_commission companyCommissionAmount, round(b.company_commission / buy.total_amount,4) companyCommissionRate,
case when a.contract_status = 'C' then 'C' when a.contract_status = 'D' then 'D' when a.dealed_amount >= a.total_amount and a.billed_amount < a.total_amount and a.receive_breach_amount < a.breach_amount then 'YJ' when a.breach_days > 0 and a.breach_days <= 15 and a.dealed_amount < a.total_amount then 'Y' when a.breach_days > 15 and a.dealed_amount < a.total_amount then 'W' when a.billed_amount >= a.total_amount and a.dealed_amount >= a.total_amount then 'D' when a.billed_amount >= a.total_amount then 'V' when a.confirm_receive_number >= a.total_number then 'M' when a.warehouse_number >= a.total_number then 'G' when a.dealed_amount >= a.total_amount then 'F' when a.seal_flg = true then 'S' when a.status = 'D' then 'B' else 'N' end as contractStatus
from t_ctr_contract a left join t_apply_match b on b.approve_id = a.approve_id left join t_pm_approve c on c.id = a.approve_id left join t_apply_match_detail buy on buy.apply_match_id = b.id left join t_apply_match_detail sell on sell.apply_match_id = b.id left join t_ctr_contract buyc on buyc.id = buy.contract_id left join t_ctr_contract_apply buyt on buyc.id = buyt.ctr_contract_id left join t_ctr_contract_apply sellt on a.id = sellt.ctr_contract_id left join t_ctr_dcsx dc on dc.approve_id = a.approve_id
where a.status = 'D' and dc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and a.contract_type = 'S' and buy.contract_type = 'B' and sell.contract_type = 'S'
and c.id in
#{item}
order by a.contract_time desc

select c.approve_no, a.products_name productName, a.contract_time, a.total_number,
a.match_user_name, a.match_user_id,
d.buy_commission_amount buyCommission,
dc.contract_no buyContractNo, dc.company_name buyCompanyName, dc.deal_price bdealPrice, dc.total_amount btotalAmount,
a.contract_no sellContractNo, a.company_name sellCompanyName, sell.deal_price sdealPrice, sell.total_amount stotalAmount, d.sell_commission_amount sellCommission,
a.credit_cycle creditDays, a.settlement_type, sell.premium*a.total_number premiumAmount, a.service_amount serviceAmount, d.vat_amount as valueAddedTax, d.surtax as saleSurtax, d.print_amount as stampTax, d.capital_cost as capitalCost, d.insurance_cost as insuranceCost, d.margin_amount marginAmount, d.company_commission_amount, round(d.company_commission_amount/buy.total_amount,4) companyCommissionRate, d.marketing_retention marketingRetention, d.company_commission_amount companyCommission, d.net_profit netProfit,
case when a.contract_status = 'C' then 'C' when a.contract_status = 'D' then 'D' when a.dealed_amount >= a.total_amount and a.billed_amount < a.total_amount and a.receive_breach_amount < a.breach_amount then 'YJ' when a.breach_days > 0 and a.breach_days <= 15 and a.dealed_amount < a.total_amount then 'Y' when a.breach_days > 15 and a.dealed_amount < a.total_amount then 'W' when a.billed_amount >= a.total_amount and a.dealed_amount >= a.total_amount then 'D' when a.billed_amount >= a.total_amount then 'V' when a.confirm_receive_number >= a.total_number then 'M' when a.warehouse_number >= a.total_number then 'G' when a.dealed_amount >= a.total_amount then 'F' when a.seal_flg = true then 'S' when a.status = 'D' then 'B' else 'N' end as contractStatus
from t_ctr_contract a left join t_pm_approve c on c.id = a.approve_id left join t_apply_match b on b.approve_id = a.approve_id left join t_apply_match_detail buy on buy.apply_match_id = b.id left join t_ctr_contract buyc on buyc.id = buy.contract_id left join t_apply_match_detail sell on sell.apply_match_id = b.id left join t_budget_settlement d on d.sell_contract_id = a.id left join t_ctr_dcsx dc on dc.approve_id = c.id
where a.status = 'D' and dc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and a.contract_type = 'S' and buy.contract_type = 'B' and sell.contract_type = 'S' and d.id is not null
and c.id in
#{item}

select sum(a.total_number) totalTotalNumber, sum(dc.deal_price) / count(a.id) aveBdealPrice, sum(sell.deal_price) / count(a.id) aveSdealPrice, sum(dc.total_amount) totalBtotalAmount, sum(sell.total_amount) totalStotalAmount, sum(a.credit_cycle)/count(a.id) aveCreditDays, sum(sell.premium * a.total_number) totalPremiumAmount, sum(a.service_amount) totalServiceAmount,
sum(d.vat_amount) as totalValueAddedTax, sum(d.surtax) as totalSaleSurtax, sum(d.print_amount) as totalStampTax,
sum(d.margin_amount) totalMarginAmount, sum(d.company_commission_amount) totalCompanyCommissionAmount, round(sum(d.company_commission_amount) / sum(buy.total_amount), 4) aveCompanyCommissionRate, sum(d.marketing_retention) totalMarketingRetention, sum(d.buy_commission_amount) totalBuyCommission, sum(d.sell_commission_amount) totalSellCommission, sum(d.company_commission_amount) totalCompanyCommission, sum(d.net_profit) totalNetProfit, sum(d.capital_cost) as totalCapitalCost, sum(d.insurance_cost) as totalInsuranceCost
from t_ctr_contract a left join t_pm_approve c on c.id = a.approve_id left join t_apply_match b on b.approve_id = a.approve_id left join t_apply_match_detail buy on buy.apply_match_id = b.id left join t_ctr_contract buyc on buyc.id = buy.contract_id left join t_apply_match_detail sell on sell.apply_match_id = b.id left join t_budget_settlement d on d.sell_contract_id = a.id left join t_ctr_dcsx dc on dc.approve_id = c.id where a.status = 'D' and dc.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and a.contract_type = 'S' and buy.contract_type = 'B' and sell.contract_type = 'S' and d.id is not null
and c.id in
#{item}

sql.if: and (a.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and a.business_type_dcsx in ('BL','PT') and a.match_credit_flg = true)
and (a.business_type = 'ZY-BB' and a.match_credit_flg = true and a.business_type_dcsx in ('DCSXBL','DCSX','DCSXHDFK'))
and ( a.sell_contract_no like CONCAT('%',#{contractNo},'%') or a.buy_contract_no like CONCAT('%',#{contractNo},'%') )

if.test: level != null and level != '' and level.toString() == '3'.toString()

sql.if: and ( a.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameOne},'%') and a.brand_number LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameTwo},'%') and a.factory_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameThree},'%') )

if.test: level != null and level != '' and level.toString() == '2'.toString()

sql.if: and ( (a.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameOne},'%') and a.brand_number LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameTwo},'%')) or (a.brand_number LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameOne},'%') and a.factory_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameTwo},'%')) )

if.test: level != null and level != '' and level.toString() == '1'.toString()

sql.if: and ( a.product_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameOne},'%') or a.brand_number LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameOne},'%') or a.factory_name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{productsNameOne},'%') )

mapper.select:
select CONCAT(a.product_name,'/',a.brand_number,'/',a.factory_name) productsName, a.sell_contract_id, a.sell_contract_no, a.buy_contract_id, a.buy_contract_no, a.contract_time, a.status settlementStatus, a.deal_number, a.sell_price, a.buy_price, if(a.print_amount is null ,0,a.print_amount) printAmount, a.insurance_rate, a.enterprise_id, a.delivery_time, a.pay_full_time, a.real_pay_full_time, a.receive_date, a.appoint_pay_date, a.confirm_receipt_date, a.settlement_date, a.receive_bill_date, a.summary_date, a.buy_company_id, a.buy_company_name, a.sell_company_id, a.sell_company_name, a.buy_our_company_name, a.sell_our_company_name, a.buy_match_user_id, a.buy_match_user_name, a.sell_match_user_id, a.sell_match_user_name, a.delivery_fee, a.breach_day, a.breach_amount, a.credit_cycle, a.business_type, a.match_credit_flg, a.buy_total_amount, a.sell_total_amount, a.transport_amount, a.warehouse_amount, if(a.vat_amount is null ,0,a.vat_amount) vatAmount, if(a.financial_service_amount is null ,0,a.financial_service_amount) financialServiceAmount, a.vat_spread_amount, if(a.surcharge_amount is null ,0,a.surcharge_amount) surchargeAmount, a.taxes_surcharges_amount, if(a.after_tax_spread_amount is null ,0,a.after_tax_spread_amount) afterTaxSpreadAmount, a.sell_head_user_id, a.sell_head_commission_amount, a.buy_head_user_id, a.buy_head_commission_amount, a.sell_match_amount, a.buy_match_amount, a.receive_flg, a.confirm_flg, a.bill_flg, a.settlement_code, a.created_date, a.updated_date, a.breach_rate, a.settle_status, a.settle_total_flg, a.approve_id, a.approve_no, a.dept_id, a.dept_name from t_ctr_contract_settlement a
a.enable_flg = TRUE
order by a.contract_time desc

select sum(a.deal_number) totalDealNumber, sum(a.buy_price) / count(a.id) aveBuyPrice, sum(a.sell_price) / count(a.id) aveSellPrice, sum(a.buy_total_amount) totalBuyTotalAmount, sum(a.sell_total_amount) totalSellTotalAmount, sum(a.financial_service_amount) totalFinancialServiceAmount, sum(a.vat_amount) totalVatAmount, sum(a.surcharge_amount) totalSurchargeAmount, sum(a.print_amount) as totalPrintAmount, sum(a.after_tax_spread_amount) as totalAfterTaxSpreadAmount from t_ctr_contract_settlement a
a.enable_flg = TRUE
order by a.contract_time desc
